task_completion.description: Verify the 'Processed-Logs' folder was created in BlueMail.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The BlueMail application sidebar should display a custom folder named 'Processed-Logs'.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'ErrorLogs' directory was created in the local Documents folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager window or terminal showing the 'ErrorLogs' folder existing inside the '~/Documents/' directory.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent identified and opened emails containing technical error logs or stack traces.
task_completion.visual_evidence: BlueMail showing an open email whose body contains technical error logs, code snippets, or stack traces.

task_completion.description: Verify at least 3 unique text files containing extracted error logs were saved in the ErrorLogs directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager or text editor showing at least 3 distinct files inside '~/Documents/ErrorLogs/'. The files must contain text extracted from the emails.

task_completion.description: Verify the processed emails were moved to the 'Processed-Logs' folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: BlueMail showing the 'Processed-Logs' folder opened, containing the 3 or more emails that were previously processed.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the graphical user interface to interact with emails.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the BlueMail GUI to read and move emails, rather than bypassing the email client entirely.

integrity.description: Ensure the extracted text genuinely comes from the emails.
integrity.visual_evidence: The content visible in the saved text files must match the text seen in the source emails, not hallucinated or copied from the task description.

integrity.description: Ensure no loose log files were left in the Documents root directory.
integrity.visual_evidence: When viewing the '~/Documents/' directory, there should be no loose text files containing logs; they must all be properly placed inside the 'ErrorLogs' folder.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target local directory: /home/ga/Documents/ErrorLogs. Target mail folder: Processed-Logs. Minimum files required: 3. The extracted text in each file must be at least 15 characters long and exist in the source emails. Ensure no loose files were left in the Documents root directory.
